news.t: Cambria Value And Momentum ETF (VAMO) Ranked Best Among Top US Multifactor Smart Beta ETFs

holdings.infoBox: VAMO is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash Offset stock at 38.52%, First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X at 7.08%, OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 5.72%, Garrett Motion at 1.57%, and TD SYNNEX at 1.48%.

overview.description: The Cambria Value & Momentum ETF (VAMO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of large-, mid and small-cap US stocks selected by long-term value factors and midterm momentum factors. The managers have discretion to hedge up to 100% of the portfolio. VAMO was launched on Sep 9, 2015 and is issued by Cambria.

data.text: Q.ai's deep learning algorithms have identified several of the top US Multifactor Smart Beta ETFs based on fund flows over the last 90-days, 30-days, and 7-days.
